src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot servlet initializer import to the new package structure introduced in Spring Boot 2.0+.
Update the JHipster configuration utility import to reflect the new package structure in JHipster 6+.
Refine class documentation to use code formatting and correct capitalization for better readability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: * This is a helper Java class that provides an alternative to creating a {@code web.xml}.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace verbose block comment with a concise single-line comment for setting the default profile.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: // set a default to use when no profile is configured.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit Spring Boot annotations with the consolidated @SpringBootApplication annotation.
Switch from field injection using @Inject to constructor injection for the Environment bean.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private final Environment env; public JhipsterSampleGatewayApp(Environment env) { this.env = env; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update profile constant references to use the new JHipsterConstants class instead of the old Constants class.
Refactor the main method to remove the throws clause and extract startup logging into a dedicated helper method.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public static void main(String[] args) { ... logApplicationStartup(env); }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Improve startup logging to include protocol (http/https), context path, and active profiles.
Update imports to reflect the new package structure and removed dependencies.
Replace field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @Inject on Environment field and added public LoggingAspect(Environment env) constructor.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update environment profile checking to use the newer Environment.acceptsProfiles(Profiles.of(...)) API instead of the older string array method.
Refactor AspectJ pointcuts to target Spring stereotypes (@Repository, @Service, @RestController) in addition to package-based matching for more precise logging scope.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced single loggingPointcut with springBeanPointcut (stereotype-based) and applicationPackagePointcut (package-based), combining them in advice.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Extract logger retrieval into a helper method to reduce code duplication and ensure the logger matches the specific join point's declaring type.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private Logger logger(JoinPoint joinPoint) method and replaced inline LoggerFactory.getLogger calls.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify log message templates by removing the declaring type name, as the logger itself is now scoped to the specific class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed log format strings from "Exception in {}.{}()" to "Exception in {}()".

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update imports to use the new JHipster configuration constants package structure.
Replace custom JHipster properties with Spring Boot's standard TaskExecutionProperties for thread pool configuration.
Switch from field injection using @Inject to constructor injection for better testability and immutability.
Update the import for ExceptionHandlingAsyncTaskExecutor to reflect the new package structure in the JHipster library.
Replace wildcard imports with explicit imports and remove unused javax.inject.Inject import.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for required dependencies to improve testability and adhere to modern Spring best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private final Environment env; public CacheConfiguration(Environment env, ...) { this.env = env; ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use setter injection with @Autowired(required=false) for the optional Registration bean instead of field injection.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: @Autowired(required = false) public void setRegistration(Registration registration) { this.registration = registration; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update profile checking logic to use the new Profiles.of() API introduced in Spring Boot 2.1+.
Switch from DiscoveryClient.getLocalServiceInstance() to Registration.getServiceId() for retrieving the service ID, aligning with Spring Cloud Commons changes.
Add a check to reuse an existing Hazelcast instance if one is already initialized, preventing duplicate instance creation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: HazelcastInstance hazelCastInstance = Hazelcast.getHazelcastInstanceByName("jhipsterSampleGateway"); if (hazelCastInstance != null) { return hazelCastInstance; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unnecessary instance variable assignment for CacheManager and return the new instance directly.
Consolidate and update imports to use wildcard imports for Hazelcast config and remove unused specific imports.
Remove the @AutoConfigureAfter annotation which is no longer strictly necessary or has been handled differently in the updated configuration.
The login validation regex was updated to support email addresses and a broader set of special characters.
Removed hardcoded Spring profile constants (dev, prod, cloud, heroku, etc.) likely in favor of configuration properties or externalized config.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed SPRING_PROFILE_DEVELOPMENT, SPRING_PROFILE_PRODUCTION, SPRING_PROFILE_CLOUD, SPRING_PROFILE_HEROKU, SPRING_PROFILE_SWAGGER, SPRING_PROFILE_NO_LIQUIBASE

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Renamed the constant SYSTEM_ACCOUNT to SYSTEM for brevity or consistency with other parts of the codebase.
Added a constant for the default application language.
Changed the style of the private constructor body from empty block with newline to empty block on same line.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for the Environment bean to align with modern Spring best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private final Environment env; public DatabaseConfiguration(Environment env) { this.env = env; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Delegate H2 TCP server creation to a JHipster helper class and update the return type to Object to avoid dependency on specific H2 server classes.
Implement logic to calculate a valid port for the H2 TCP server based on the application server port.
Update the profile constant reference from the old Constants class to the new JHipsterConstants class.
Remove manual Liquibase bean configuration as it is likely handled by Spring Boot auto-configuration or a different mechanism in the newer version.
Remove the explicit Hibernate4Module bean definition, likely because Jackson Hibernate modules are now auto-configured or handled differently.
Remove unused imports related to Liquibase, H2 Server, and Hibernate modules that were removed from the class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for AsyncSpringLiquibase, Hibernate4Module, SpringLiquibase, Server, LiquibaseProperties, javax.inject.Inject, javax.sql.DataSource

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused javax.inject.Inject import as it is no longer used in the class.
Add import for RouteLocator required for the new AccessControlFilter constructor.
Add import for JHipsterProperties required for the new AccessControlFilter constructor.
Add space before parenthesis in method definition for code style consistency.
Change AccessControlFilter bean creation to inject RouteLocator and JHipsterProperties via constructor arguments instead of no-arg constructor.
Simplify JavaDoc for RateLimitingConfiguration to remove Cassandra-specific instructions and reference Bucket4J.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl:

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the RateLimitingRepository bean and its import as it is no longer used in the rate limiting implementation.
Switch from field injection with @Inject to constructor injection for JHipsterProperties in RateLimitingConfiguration.
Update RateLimitingFilter instantiation to remove the RateLimitingRepository argument.
Replace the deprecated WebMvcConfigurerAdapter class with the WebMvcConfigurer interface to comply with Spring Boot 2.x requirements.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the EnvironmentAware interface implementation and associated RelaxedPropertyResolver logic as it is no longer needed for the locale resolver configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the import for AngularCookieLocaleResolver to use the new tech.jhipster package structure.
Remove the explicit name attribute from the @Bean annotation for localeResolver as it is not strictly required.
Replace specific WebMvcConfigurerAdapter import with a wildcard import for the web.servlet.config.annotation package.
Replace deprecated Spring Boot Constants with JHipster-specific constants for profile definitions.
Inject Environment bean into the configuration to pass it to the LoggingAspect constructor.
Update LoggingAspect instantiation to accept the Environment object.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for Spring beans and values.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove @PostConstruct method in favor of constructor initialization.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @PostConstruct private void init() and moved logic to constructor.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace manual string concatenation for JSON custom fields with ObjectMapper.
Replace manual Logback appender configuration with JHipster LoggingUtils helper methods.
Remove imports for classes no longer used directly in the class body.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for AsyncAppender, LogstashSocketAppender, ShortenedThrowableConverter, javax.annotation.PostConstruct, javax.inject.Inject.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add @RefreshScope annotation to allow configuration refresh at runtime.
Include application version from BuildProperties in logging custom fields.
Add support for JSON formatted console logging based on properties.
Add a context listener to update custom fields dynamically when logging is enabled.
Replace field injection with constructor injection to align with modern Spring best practices.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove imports for classes no longer used in the configuration class.
Integrate Zalando Problem library for standardized security error responses.
Explicitly add CorsFilter to the security filter chain.
Configure Content-Security-Policy, Referrer-Policy, and Feature-Policy headers.
Change frame options from disable to deny for stricter security.
Update the list of static resources ignored by Spring Security.
Refine API endpoint permissions, including renaming reset-password paths and adding admin constraints.
Allow public access to specific management endpoints like health and info.
Remove the deprecated configureGlobal method for AuthenticationManagerBuilder.
Remove the SecurityEvaluationContextExtension bean which is no longer needed.
Remove the Http401UnauthorizedEntryPoint field as it is replaced by SecurityProblemSupport.
Remove the UserDetailsService field as authentication is handled differently.
Add formatter off/on comments to preserve code formatting in the security configuration.
